title: bursa pubens
intro: Bursa pubens, also known as wolf's bane or stinking willie, is a plant species in the genus Bursa, which is a type of flowering plant that produces small, yellowish-green flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Bursa pubens include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and infections. Herbal preparations of Bursa pubens include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
